decisions.evidenceNote: Jina AI's official about page says the company was founded in 2020 by Han Xiao; currentTitle already says CEO & Founder @ Jina AI.
Yoshua Bengio's official profile identifies him as founder and scientific advisor of Mila; currentTitle includes Scientific Director @ Mila.
Jeff Dean's Google Research profile says he is Google's Chief Scientist focusing on AI advances for Google DeepMind and Google Research.
Code for Society refers to Timnit Gebru as DAIR Founder and Executive Director; currentTitle says Founder @ DAIR Institute.
Raia Hadsell's homepage says she is a VP of Research at Google DeepMind; currentTitle says VP Research @ Google DeepMind.
Shakir Mohamed's homepage says he is a Director for research at Google DeepMind in London; existing currentTitle was less precise.

decisions.currentTitle: Principal Research Scientist / Director @ Google DeepMind
decisions.evidenceNote: Kelvin Guu's homepage title is Principal Research Scientist / Director at Google DeepMind; existing currentTitle incorrectly pointed to MIT.

decisions.currentTitle: Associate Professor @ University of Texas at Austin; Director and Distinguished Research Scientist @ NVIDIA Research
decisions.evidenceNote: Yuke Zhu's homepage says he is an Associate Professor at UT Austin and a Director and Distinguished Research Scientist at NVIDIA Research; existing currentTitle incorrectly pointed to Apple.

decisions.currentTitle: VP @ NVIDIA; Founder and CEO @ Lepton AI
decisions.evidenceNote: Yangqing Jia's homepage lists VP NVIDIA and Founder and CEO Lepton AI; existing currentTitle only mentioned Lepton AI.
Megvii's official news page says Megvii was founded in Beijing in 2011 by Yin Qi, Tang Wenbin and Yang Mu; currentTitle says CEO & Co-founder @ 旷视科技.
